detail: Terry v. Ohio (1968) topic brief; 'hidden system' angle = origin of the everyday street stop; score 89/100; R2 (policing, real persons, neutral). Opens EP6-8 surveillance/state-vs-you trilogy.
Owner content-approved the EP6-8 slate + scripts (Terry/Riley/Carpenter) in chat; see episodes/_planning/EP6-8_HANDOFF.md sec.8. state -> approved.

9 claims (all approved), 2 sources (Cornell LII primary opinion 392 U.S. 1; Oyez). Facts fact-checked 2026-06-20 vs the primary opinion (8-1, Jun 10 1968, Warren; Douglas sole dissent; Cleveland Oct 31 1963; McFadden 39y; ~dozen window trips; reasonable-suspicion + weapons-frisk). Research QC: warn (durable source hashes pending), non-blocking.

script.en.v001.md (~1,700 words, ~12:00) + script.annotated.v001.json (27 spans, claim-linked) authored in house style; present-tense framing; next-episode tease to Riley. content_hash sha256:9796129c11dd14d0536f5584eabc2dbe61a79f90c2e9b5bd1b084f4becc34b16. state -> script_review.

Owner content/direction sign-off (APR-0001) bound to the annotated-script content_hash. Binding final-script gate carries forward provided no fact/claim change; script_qc + durable source hashes still required before publish.
Extended to ~1692 words / ~11min with substantive claim-grounded content (no fact/claim change). New annotated content_hash sha256:6211aa2f4eddbc26545abc77a69e92b2b2a79f7954c6e03b866614817bf4426d.
script_qc PASS: FK grade 7-8, no AI-filler phrases, em-dash density ok, claim-link consistency pass (dangling=0, unused=0), timing ~11min. Durable source content hashes captured 2026-06-20.
state -> script_verified. Owner content sign-off (APR-0001) re-bound to extended annotated hash. Codex may begin scenes/visuals.

Codex authored 04_scenes scene_plan, shotlist, visual_bible, codex_image_prompts, remotion_plan, and visual_qc_plan from locked script.annotated.v001.json. Coverage 30/30 spans, schema pass. Owner requested premium image bar; no generated image may enter first-cut without QC + rights registration. state -> scene_planned.

Local A1111/SDXL generation started on H:/pd-media. 15 candidates generated/reviewed across S001/S003. S001 not locked: candidates failed POV/pat-down/anatomy/badge/text standards. S003 accepted: PD-2026-006-terry-S003-IMG-001, sha256:38263f5a202dd0b7675e2a0b4154765b6b50f9a8668111239496479111935ed6, rights registered, QC score 93. state -> assets_generating.

S004 empty storefront background approved after rejecting people-in-window candidates for extra person/faces/text risk. Repeated-trip fact will be rendered as exact Remotion path-counter overlay.

S018 coat-fabric boundary motif approved. Accepted PD-2026-006-terry-S018-IMG-001, sha256:65126460a83dd5e9707680dcc0de88969732d2643d72c6ab9b9de0f9af416aee, QC score 92, rights registered. Use as outer-clothing/weapons-only motif with Remotion overlay, not as literal pat-down action.
